About Me

Passionate about building great software

Currently pursuing a B.E. in Computer Science at NMIT Bengaluru, with a strong foundation in both development and quality assurance.

I'm a full-stack developer with hands-on experience building real-world applications from scratch. My primary stack is React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB, and I love crafting responsive, animated frontends paired with robust RESTful APIs.

Beyond coding, I'm into creative poster designing, UI/UX, social media management, and cricket. I'm open to hybrid roles in Bengaluru and eager to contribute to impactful products.
